_meta.source: DPLH Local Planning Scheme — Zones and Reserves (DPLH-071) + R Codes (DPLH-070) via SLIP Public REST/WMS
_meta.licence: DPLH Data Licensing Agreement — open display/identify use only. Dataset-level restriction: 'not to be used for commercial purposes'. Bulk vector (WFS/GeoPackage/FGDB): Government-Use-Only, requires signed DPLH licence agreement.
_meta.licence_status: BLOCKED FOR BULK DB INGEST — do not ingest polygon geometry into PostGIS without a DPLH licence or City of Vincent direct data agreement. On-demand REST point queries may be used during the demo phase (display/identify use), but confirm in writing with DPLH. See docs/DATA_ACQUISITION_RUNBOOK.md Section 4 human-loop items 2 and 3.
_meta.scope: City of Vincent (LGA code 117 in DPLH scheme data; ABS LGA code 58570). Scheme: Local Planning Scheme No. 2 (LPS2), gazetted 2026-05-16. An amended Local Planning Strategy was endorsed for public advertising March 2026 — confirm operative status with City of Vincent before production ingest.
_meta.pull_method_demo: ArcGIS REST point-in-polygon query (no DB storage of geometry). Replace <lon> and <lat> with actual coordinates.
_meta.endpoint_status: VERIFIED 2026-06-09 — REST MapServer layers 111 and 112 respond without authentication. GetCapabilities returns valid XML listing both layers. Restricted bulk WFS (services.slip.wa.gov.au) confirmed to exist but Government-Use-Only.

schema.description: Expected GeoJSON structure returned by DPLH REST query endpoint. Fields confirmed from REST MapServer GetCapabilities and layer metadata.

properties.zone_label: <string — human-readable label, may differ from zone code>
properties.scheme_nam: <string — e.g. 'City of Vincent Local Planning Scheme No. 2'>
properties._db_mapping: code <- zone, label <- zone_label, geom <- geometry (MULTIPOLYGON GDA2020)

geometry._note: Geometry withheld from this sample file — bulk polygon storage requires DPLH licence. On-demand point queries return only the intersecting feature properties.

properties.scheme_nam: <string — e.g. 'City of Vincent Local Planning Scheme No. 2'>
properties._db_mapping: code <- rcode_no, label <- rcode_no, geom <- geometry (MULTIPOLYGON GDA2020)

geometry._note: Geometry withheld — same licence restriction as zone layer.

human_loop_actions: Email spatialdata@dplh.wa.gov.au to request bulk licence for DPLH-071 and DPLH-070 (see runbook Section 4 item 2)
Email mail@vincent.wa.gov.au to request LPS2 zoning data directly from City of Vincent (see runbook Section 4 item 3 — PREFERRED PATH)
